meta.title: Tokenized oil, minerals & rare-earth RWA registry
meta.note: Seed registry. Entries compiled from public issuer documentation and require verification before publication. The headline finding is the gap itself: no tokenized crude oil or rare-earth product currently operates at institutional scale.

gap.oilEquityNote: Approximate combined market capitalization of listed oil & gas majors (illustrative order of magnitude)
gap.tokenizedCommodityNote: Approximate live tokenized commodity value, dominated by gold products (PAXG, XAUT)
gap.miningEquityNote: Approximate combined market capitalization of listed mining & materials majors (illustrative order of magnitude)
gap.rareEarthNote: No tokenized rare-earth instrument exists at any scale — the second whitespace GEOM tracks

assets.name: Petro
assets.relevance: Cautionary precedent: oil-linked token without verifiable reserves attestation or redemption, wound down in 2024

assets.name: Direct tokenized crude (barrels / royalty streams)
assets.relevance: The primary whitespace GEOM targets: no verifiable, institutionally credible tokenized crude instrument exists today

assets.name: Energy-asset tokenization pilots (e.g. PermianChain-style)
assets.relevance: Pilot-scale platforms have tokenized upstream interests; none reached institutional scale or continuous disclosure

assets.name: Pax Gold
assets.relevance: Benchmark for compliant commodity-backed token structure — the template a crude- or REE-backed token would follow

assets.name: Tether Gold
assets.relevance: Largest tokenized commodity by market value alongside PAXG

assets.name: Kinesis Gold
assets.relevance: Gram-denominated allocated gold with yield mechanics — alternative structure to PAXG/XAUT

assets.name: VNX Gold
assets.relevance: EU-regulated issuer under Liechtenstein token law — regulatory template relevant to any EU-listed resource token

assets.name: Comtech Gold
assets.relevance: Gulf-jurisdiction gold token — regional precedent for commodity tokenization out of the UAE

assets.name: Perth Mint Gold Token
assets.relevance: Cautionary precedent: even a government-mint-backed token wound down (2023) without institutional adoption

assets.name: Digix Gold
assets.relevance: Early (2018) gold token wound down 2023 — demonstrates redemption-model fragility without scale

assets.name: Kinesis Silver
assets.relevance: The main live tokenized-silver product — silver coverage is far thinner than gold

assets.name: LODE Silver (AGX)
assets.relevance: Community silver-token project — tracked as structure precedent, custody verification pending

assets.name: Tokenized platinum / palladium / PGMs
assets.relevance: PGMs (auto catalysts, hydrogen) have no credible tokenized instrument — open whitespace

assets.name: Uranium.io tokenized U3O8
assets.relevance: First physical-uranium tokenization with named custody — the closest live analog to what tokenized crude would require

assets.name: Tokenized copper & nickel
assets.relevance: LME-scale physical markets with zero verified tokenization — base-metals whitespace mirrors crude

assets.name: Tokenized lithium
assets.relevance: Strategic battery input with no on-chain instrument; offtake tokenization repeatedly announced, never verified

assets.name: Tokenized cobalt & graphite
assets.relevance: Supply-chain provenance pilots exist (ledger-tracking), but no asset-backed token — provenance ≠ tokenization

assets.name: Tokenized rare earths (NdPr, Dy, Tb)
assets.relevance: The second whitespace GEOM targets: strategic REE demand, export-control pressure, and zero tokenized instruments

assets.name: REE offtake / royalty tokenization pilots
assets.relevance: Announcements exist around REE offtake tokenization; none has produced a verifiable on-chain instrument

assets.name: Tokenized oil-major equity wrappers
assets.relevance: Equity wrapper programs exist but oil & gas coverage is thin and unverified — tracked as a coverage gap

assets.name: Tokenized mining-major equity wrappers
assets.relevance: Mining and REE equities are barely covered by wrapper programs — same coverage gap as oil majors

assets.name: Ondo Short-Term US Govt Bond
assets.relevance: Context: institutional RWA rails exist and are proven for treasuries — not yet applied to energy or minerals

assets.name: BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund
assets.relevance: Context: the largest asset manager runs tokenized funds at scale — institutional appetite is proven, resource assets remain unserved
